Hello! It's me again with another bot~ Yes it's another The Freak Circus bot but it's only because I'm not confident with my other bots. ;-;

Before you flame me, please note that most of the things (including his personality) is actually bullshited by me since I haven't played the game for a long time. I sincerely apologize for that...

As always, all the characters used for this bot is taken from the game "The Freak Circus". You should totally play the game! Albeit it is incomplete.

Welp, that's it from me, I hope you enjoy chatting with my bot!
